Links: [{"title":"130th anniversary focus on 1889 - The Eiffel Tower","url":"https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/news/130-years/1889-2019-130-years-amazement"},{"title":"Eiffel Tower history, architecture, design & construction","url":"https://www.toureiffel.paris/en/the-monument/history"},{"title":"Eiffel Tower - Wikipedia","url":"https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Eiffel_Tower"},{"title":"The History of the Eiffel Tower - PARISCityVISION","url":"https://www.pariscityvision.com/en/paris/landmarks/eiffel-tower/history"},{"title":"Date of construction of the Eiffel Tower - PARISCityVISION","url":"https://www.pariscityvision.com/en/paris/landmarks/eiffel-tower/construction-date"},{"title":"Eiffel Tower opens in Paris | March 31, 1889 | HISTORY","url":"https://www.history.com/this-day-in-history/march-31/eiffel-tower-opens"},{"title":"The History and construction of the Eiffel Tower | Un jour de plus à Paris","url":"https://www.unjourdeplusaparis.com/en/paris-reportage/histoire-construction-tour-eiffel"},{"title":"ON THIS DAY: The Eiffel tower is officially inaugurated (1889) - Sigmalive English","url":"https://en.sigmalive.com/on-this-day-the-eiffel-tower-is-officially-inaugurated-1889/"},{"title":"Eiffel Tower History: From Controversial Landmark to Paris' Icon","url":"https://www.paristickets.com/eiffel-tower/history/"},{"title":"31st March 1889: The Eiffel Tower officially completed and inaugurated in Paris for the Exposition Universelle | HistoryPod","url":"https://www.historypod.net/03/31/31st-march-1889-the-eiffel-tower-officially-completed-and-inaugurated-in-paris-for-the-exposition-universelle/"}]

Based on the search results, here are the key facts about the Eiffel Tower's construction completion and inauguration in 1889:

## Construction Completion and Inauguration

The construction of the Eiffel Tower structure was completed on Sunday, March 31, 1889, and it was inaugurated at 1:30 p.m. while workers were still working on the interior fittings and the elevators hadn't been installed yet.

## Construction Timeline

Construction of the Eiffel Tower began in 1887 and was finished in record time for a structure of its size – 2 years, 2 months and 5 days. The foundations on the banks of the Seine were laid in just 5 months.

## The Inauguration Ceremony

Gustave Eiffel raised a French flag at the top of the Tower in the presence of the Director of the World's Fair and some of his employees, and certain personalities from the Government and the City of Paris. On 31 March 1889, Gustave Eiffel led a group of dignitaries—including journalists and government officials—up the tower himself, climbing all 1,710 steps to the top (as the lifts were not yet operational).

## Initial Reception

The criticism that had accompanied the construction of the Tower burnt itself out, in light of the enormous popular success with which it was greeted throughout 1889. The Tower received nearly 2 million visitors who came during the World's Fair to admire this architectural masterpiece.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
